# Generic polyglot fixture — Week 7 Day 7 matrix

Covers first-cut generic languages and format-native config/docs:

- Go, Rust, C, C++, C#, Ruby, Shell, SQL
- package.json, docker-compose, Cargo.toml, pom.xml, Dockerfile
- Markdown architecture doc

All files are `support_level=generic`. Tree-sitter / format parsers produce
chunks with `verified_deep=false`. No verified Symbol rows for these languages.
